L1.area: Document processing and content parsing utilities

L2.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where the XML parser processes untrusted XML content without disabling external entity resolution. An attacker can supply crafted XML input to read arbitrary files from the server or perform server-side request forgery.

L3.area: XML reader component and its document string parsing methods
L3.description: An XML External Entity (XXE) vulnerability exists where XML content loaded from strings or archive entries is parsed without disabling external entity resolution. An attacker can supply crafted XML input to read arbitrary files from the server or perform server-side request forgery.

ground_truth.reason: The XMLReader class parses XML content without calling libxml_disable_entity_loader, allowing external entity declarations in crafted XML to trigger file disclosure or SSRF.
